articles.author: Susan Tompor, USA TODAY NETWORK
articles.title: Is bitcoin really an inflation hedge? Experts say there’s little proof
articles.description: Analysts say bitcoin lacks proof it can protect against rising prices, raising questions about its real value when costs go up.
articles.content:
A burst of inflation in 2026 has reignited buzz that bitcoin and other cryptocurrency are a great hedge against inflation.
Bitcoin, the leading digital token, has a fixed supply; not true for the U.… [+8963 chars]
